photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a custom financial category for organizing transactions, such as 'Food', 'Transport', or 'Salary'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this category. (Relationship: User 1:N Category)

type.description: The type of transactions this category applies to ('income' or 'expense').

icon.description: A visual icon identifier associated with the category for better recognition.

color.description: A hexadecimal color code associated with the category for visual distinction (e.g., '#FF5733').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the category was last updated.

Recurrence.title: Recurrence
Recurrence.description: Manages settings for recurring financial transactions, such as subscriptions or rent payments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Recurrence entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this recurrence. (Relationship: User 1:N Recurrence)

description.description: A brief description of the recurring financial event.

type.description: The type of transaction ('income' or 'expense') this recurrence represents.

amount.description: The monetary value of each occurrence of the recurring transaction.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category associated with this recurring transaction. (Relationship: Category 1:N Recurrence)

paymentMethod.description: The method used for this recurring payment (e.g., 'Credit Card', 'Bank Transfer').

startDate.description: The date when the recurring transaction started.

endDate.description: Optional date when the recurring transaction is scheduled to end.

dayOfMonth.description: The day of the month for monthly recurrences (1-31).

dayOfWeek.description: The day of the week for weekly recurrences (0 for Sunday, 6 for Saturday).

nextOccurrenceDate.description: The calculated date for the next scheduled occurrence.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the recurrence was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the recurrence was last updated.

Installment.title: Installment
Installment.description: Manages financial transactions that are paid in multiple installments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Installment entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this installment plan. (Relationship: User 1:N Installment)

description.description: A brief description of the installment plan (e.g., 'TV Nova').

totalAmount.description: The total monetary value of the item or service being paid in installments.

numberOfInstallments.description: The total number of installments for the payment plan.

paidInstallments.description: The count of installments that have already been paid.

installmentAmount.description: The monetary value of each individual installment.

firstInstallmentDate.description: The date of the first installment payment.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category associated with this installment plan. (Relationship: Category 1:N Installment)

paymentMethod.description: The method used for these installment payments (e.g., 'Credit Card').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the installment plan was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the installment plan was last updated.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a single financial entry, either an income or an expense.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who made this transaction. (Relationship: User 1:N Transaction)

amount.description: The monetary value of the transaction.

description.description: A brief description or observation about the transaction.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category for this transaction. (Relationship: Category 1:N Transaction)

date.description: The date when the transaction occurred.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment used (e.g., 'Credit Card', 'Cash', 'Pix').

isRecurrent.description: Indicates if this transaction is part of a recurring series.

recurrenceId.description: Reference to the Recurrence entity if this transaction is part of a recurring series. (Relationship: Recurrence 1:N Transaction)

installmentId.description: Reference to the Installment entity if this transaction is part of an installment plan. (Relationship: Installment 1:N Transaction)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was last updated.

FinancialGoal.title: FinancialGoal
FinancialGoal.description: Allows users to define and track progress towards financial goals like savings or travel funds.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FinancialGoal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this financial goal. (Relationship: User 1:N FinancialGoal)

name.description: A descriptive name for the financial goal (e.g., 'Viagem para Europa', 'Reserva de Emergência').

targetAmount.description: The total monetary amount the user aims to save for this goal.

currentAmount.description: The current amount saved towards the goal.

startDate.description: The date when the financial goal was initiated.

targetDate.description: Optional target date for achieving the goal.

description.description: An optional detailed description of the goal.

color.description: A hexadecimal color code to visually represent the goal's progress bar (e.g., '#4CAF50').

icon.description: A visual icon identifier associated with the goal.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the financial goal was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the financial goal was last updated.

GoalsSummary.title: GoalsSummary
GoalsSummary.description: Aggregated summary data for all financial goals for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GoalsSummary entity (e.g., 'summary').

userId.description: Reference to the User for whom this summary was generated.

totalTargetAmount.description: The sum of target amounts for all financial goals.

totalCurrentAmount.description: The sum of current amounts saved across all financial goals.

goalsCount.description: The total number of financial goals.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the goals summary was last updated.

MonthlySummary.title: MonthlySummary
MonthlySummary.description: Aggregated financial summary data for a specific month for a user, used for historical analysis and dashboards.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MonthlySummary entity (e.g., 'userId_YYYY-MM').

userId.description: Reference to the User for whom this summary was generated. (Relationship: User 1:N MonthlySummary)

totalIncome.description: The total income recorded for the month.

totalExpense.description: The total expenses recorded for the month.

netBalance.description: The net balance (totalIncome - totalExpense) for the month.

spendingByCategory.description: An array of objects summarizing spending per category for the month.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the monthly summary was created/generated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the monthly summary was last updated.

definition.description: Stores profile information for a user, created on first login.
Stores custom financial categories, each belonging to a specific user. The 'userId' is embedded in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the User who owns this category.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Category document.

definition.description: Manages settings for recurring financial transactions, owned by a specific user. The 'userId' is embedded in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the User who owns this recurrence.

params.name: recurrenceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Recurrence document.

definition.description: Manages financial transactions that are paid in multiple installments, owned by a specific user. The 'userId' is embedded in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the User who owns this installment plan.

params.name: installmentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Installment document.

definition.description: Represents a single financial entry (income or expense) made by a specific user. The 'userId' is embedded in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the User who made this transaction.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Transaction document.

definition.description: Allows users to define and track progress towards financial goals. Each goal is owned by a specific user, with 'userId' embedded in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the User who owns this financial goal.

params.name: financialGoalId
params.description: The unique identifier for the FinancialGoal document.

definition.description: Stores aggregated financial summary data for all of a user's goals. The 'userId' is embedded in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the User for whom this summary was generated.

params.name: summaryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the GoalsSummary document (e.g., 'summary').

definition.description: Stores aggregated financial summary data for a specific month for a user. The 'userId' is embedded in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the User for whom this summary was generated.

params.name: monthlySummaryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the MonthlySummary document (e.g., 'YYYY-MM').

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore data structure leverages a strict hierarchical model with path-based ownership to ensure robust security, scalability, and debuggability. All user-specific data is nested under a top-level `/users/{userId}/` collection, followed by specific subcollections for each entity type (categories, recurrences, installments, transactions, financialGoals, monthlySummaries).

This structure achieves **Authorization Independence** by denormalizing the `userId` directly into the document path. For any document under `/users/{userId}/...`, the `userId` is explicitly available in the path wildcard. This allows Firestore security rules to directly compare `request.auth.uid` with the `{userId}` in the path (e.g., `match /users/{userId}/{collection}/{docId} { allow read, write: if request.auth.uid == userId; }`). This eliminates the need for expensive and complex `get()` calls to parent documents or checks on internal document fields for authorization, making rules atomic, simple to write, and highly performant. The `userId` field is still included within each document schema for efficient querying.

Furthermore, this design directly supports **Query Ability and Predictability (QAPs)** for `list` operations. By segregating all data belonging to a specific user under their unique path (`/users/{userId}/`), any `list` query (e.g., fetching all transactions for the current user) naturally operates within the scope of the authenticated user's data. The security rules will automatically enforce that `request.auth.uid` matches the `{userId}` in the path, ensuring that users can only list their own data and preventing rules from acting as data filters. This guarantees that `list` queries only return authorized results without leaking metadata or requiring complex client-side filtering. Each collection within a user's path maintains a homogeneous security posture (private to the owning user), simplifying rule logic and enhancing debuggability.
